# Johnny.Decimal Topology Boundary

Johnny.Decimal coordinates follow the `XX.YY_semantic_name` shape. The category
prefix is a project-local coordinate, not a universal ontology.

This fixture stays in ordinary Markdown. It documents the theory boundary
without introducing a parser-owned metadata syntax.
